title: The Man of the Slashing Sword
overview: Kenshin Himura survives a vicious bandit raid to be taken under the tutelage of master swordsman, Soujiro Hiko the 13th. Forged to be a weapon for justice, Kenshin becomes a tool for revolutionary interests as a hired assassin whose fate will become bound to Tomoe, the widow of man he has slain.

title: The Lost Cat
overview: Kenshin's role in the revolution is detailed. Tomoe is recruited to offer companionship to Kenshin. Shogunate soldiers attack the Choshu Clan.

title: The Previous Night at the Mountain Home
overview: Kenshin and Tomoe live in hiding as husband and wife. A traitor is revealed.

title: The Cross-Shaped Wound
overview: Kenshin is betrayed. Tomoe makes a choice. The Hitokiri Battosai is born.
